  "weights": {

    "R1.6": 0.0,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.2": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.3,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.5", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The request is specifically to restructure section flow, which targets section/subsection ordering and the narrative arc.",
    "RX.1": "Any proposed ordering will disclose assumptions or uncertainties about the intended emphasis or constraints.",
    "RX.2": "The restructuring will avoid introducing or implying new claims beyond reordering existing content.",
    "RX.3": "Scope will be strictly limited to section-level reorganization without sentence-level rewrites or content changes.",
    "RX.4": "Reordering will avoid juxtaposing content in ways that could mislead readers about methods, results, or attributions.",
    "RX.5": "Changes will preserve traceability by clearly mapping moved paragraphs/blocks to their original positions in the artifact."
  }
}

rationale.R1.5: The request is specifically to restructure section flow, which targets section/subsection ordering and the narrative arc.
rationale.RX.1: Any proposed ordering will disclose assumptions or uncertainties about the intended emphasis or constraints.
rationale.RX.2: The restructuring will avoid introducing or implying new claims beyond reordering existing content.
rationale.RX.3: Scope will be strictly limited to section-level reorganization without sentence-level rewrites or content changes.
rationale.RX.4: Reordering will avoid juxtaposing content in ways that could mislead readers about methods, results, or attributions.
rationale.RX.5: Changes will preserve traceability by clearly mapping moved paragraphs/blocks to their original positions in the artifact.
